=====Status unknown===== {{TrainerPoké |nick=Spearow or Tentacool |type1=??? |img=Ritchie Assunta Spearow.png |img2=Ritchie Assunta Tentacool.png |cap=Spearow |cap2=Tentacool |epnum=EP080 |epname=Friends to the End |desc=Ritchie had at least three other Pokémon during the [[Indigo Plateau Conference]] as he participated in a [[Full Battle]]. It is uncertain which ones belonged to him. However, the beginning scene in ''[[EP080|Friends to the End]]'' narrowed the situation a bit, revealing that he owns either {{p|Spearow}} or {{p|Tentacool}}. None of Spearow's moves are known.
Tentacool's only known move is {{m|Bubble}} (Tentacool could not legally learn Bubble at the time).}}
